name: commit-canvas
description: Generate a beautiful standalone HTML report from GitHub activity, repositories, and contribution data.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/commit-canvas.js && node --check ./scripts/build-pages.js && node --check ./src/cli.js && node --check ./src/github-api.js && node --check ./src/aggregate.js && node --check ./src/report.js && node --check ./src/utils.js && node --check ./test-support/helpers.js && node --check ./test/utils.test.js && node --check ./test/github-api.test.js && node --check ./test/aggregate.test.js && node --check ./test/report.test.js
